name: ISCC EU 2024 v1
description: International Sustainability and Carbon Certification for EU renewable energy and materials.

requirements.name: GHG Emission Calculation
requirements.description: Calculate and report total GHG emissions for the reporting period using the ISCC methodology.
requirements.guidanceText: Use the ISCC GHG calculation tool. Report in tCO2e. Include Scope 1 direct emissions from processing.

requirements.name: Protection of Land with High Biodiversity Value (Criteria 1.1)
requirements.description: Biomass is not produced on land with high biodiversity value.
requirements.guidanceText: Check for primary forests, highly biodiverse forests, etc.

requirements.name: Protection of Land with High Carbon Stock (Criteria 1.2)
requirements.description: Biomass is not produced on land that had a high carbon stock in January 2008.
requirements.guidanceText: Check for wetlands, continuously forested areas.
